sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Button, Container, Typography, Box, Paper } from '@mui/material';
import CodeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Code';
import RecordVoiceOverIcon from '@mui/icons-material/RecordVoiceOver';
import { Build } from '@mui/icons-material';

const HomePage = () => {
    return (
        <Container maxWidth="md">
            <Box sx={{ mt: 8, textAlign: 'center' }}>
                <Typography variant="h2" component="h1" gutterBottom>
                    Voice Controlled IDE
                </Typography>
                <Typography variant="h5" color="textSecondary" paragraph>
                    An accessible development environment for programmers with motor disabilities
                </Typography>
                
                <Box sx={{ mt: 4, display: 'flex', justifyContent: 'center', gap: 4, flexWrap: 'wrap' }}>
                    <Paper 
                        elevation={3}
                        sx={{ p: 3, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', width: 250 }}
                    >
                        <CodeIcon sx={{ fontSize: 60, mb: 2 }} />
                        <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
                            Code Generation
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" color="textSecondary" paragraph>
                            Generate code using voice commands and AI assistance
                        </Typography>
                        <Button 
                            component={Link}
                            to="/code-generation"
                            variant="contained" 
                            color="primary"
                            sx={{ mt: 2 }}
                        >
                            Get Started
                        </Button>
                    </Paper>

                    <Paper 
                        elevation={3}
                        sx={{ p: 3, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', width: 250 }}
                    >
                        <RecordVoiceOverIcon sx={{ fontSize: 60, mb: 2 }} />
                        <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
                            Code Transcription
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" color="textSecondary" paragraph>
                            Convert your voice directly into code in real-time
                        </Typography>
                        <Button 
                            component={Link}
                            to="/code-transcription"
                            variant="contained" 
                            color="primary"
                            sx={{ mt: 2 }}
                        >
                            Start Transcribing
                        </Button>
                    </Paper>

                    <Paper 
                        elevation={3}
                        sx={{ p: 3, display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', alignItems: 'center', width: 250 }}
                    >
                        <Build sx={{ fontSize: 60, mb: 2 }} />
                        <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom>
                            Code Crafting
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" color="textSecondary" paragraph>
                            Describe the code and logic, and we'll generate it using Groq AI
                        </Typography>
                        <Button 
                            component={Link}
                            to="/code-crafting"
                            variant="contained" 
                            color="primary"
                            sx={{ mt: 2 }}
                        >
                            Craft
                        </Button>
                    </Paper>
                </Box>
            </Box>
        </Container>
    );
};

export default HomePage;
